  This restaurant is gonna be a go-to for vegetarians. Ambience is inspired by the cable cars as the name suggests. Food was amazing to say the least.

3. Veg kur kure kabab.
4. Veg noodle wrap - Very good.
5. Paneer tawa masala - Good.
6. Butter kulcha.
7. Palak masala dosa - Amazing.
8. Paneer dosa - Amazing. They did not have this in the menu but they still asked me how I want it and made it exactly the way I wanted it. It was heartwarming to see them go the extra mile to satisfy the customers.
9. Anjeer halwa - Must have.

microbrewery has its own charm.

Spread across two floors
name:
the upper floor is the preferred one when it comes to seating.

Would surely visit this place again(more because I stay nearby) and try out more of their food on offer and experience the wonderful ambiance.
Cheers!"")

dish_liked: 'RATED\n  If you wanna feel nostalgic and explore your schooling days with good food then this is that place. The ambiance is really amazing which brings out the child in you. First we got the orange ice candy which I used to love in my childhood. The we had the golden basket which was a crispy assorted veggies in a plate. The veg burger was good but the patty was only based on mashed potatoes. Thai curry with rice was amazing which was served in a tiffin box which it look so unique. I just loved the mojitos here especially the watermelon and the peach flavoured ones. They also have a wide variety of freak shakes which are wholesome and quite delicious. I would definitely recommend this place mainly for the ambiance and the flavoursome food. They also have a couple of indoor board games to play with while your food arrives.')

phone:
'RATED
  This place is easy to miss as it is not in the main road and in the non-developed lanes near the KPCC office on Queens Road. This place has changed a lot over the decade - even in the spice used in its food. Seating arrangement is limited and one can opt for the self-service as well.
